name: Branch Floor Lamp - LIT4075 - Silver - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Silver Branch floor lamp, a striking addition to your home decor. Standing elegantly at 58 inches, this exquisite piece embodies modern design with its sleek silver finish. Crafted from silver polyresin, the lamp offers a perfect blend of style and functionality. Its unique branch-like structure captivates the eye, turning an everyday lamp into a conversation starter. Whether placed in the living room or a cozy corner, the warm glow it emits will create an inviting atmosphere. Transform your space into a contemporary haven with the Silver Branch floor lamp, where design meets illumination in the most sophisticated way.
